titleStmt.title: SII 26.313: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 313. (A.R. No. 295 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.
This inscription refers to the king as one ‘who was pleased to take Madurai, Karuvūr and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’.

It records the provision of irrigation facility to the lands in Āmbaṟpākkam alias Irandiḍutiyāginallūr which was a hamlet of Śeṅguṉṟum and a dēvadāna of the temple of the god Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār of Tirukkachchūr, also occurring in the above records. It is stated that this dēvadāna hamlet was owned by some individuals such as Śeṅguṉṟaṅ-kiḻāṉ Oṟṟikoṇḍāṉ Taḻuvakkuḻaindāṉ of Śeṅguṉṟam, his younger brother Kārāṇaiviṭaṅkaṉ and the latter's younger brother Perumānambi, and Kumaran Śāttan Vāraṇaṅgāttāṉ-Aṟamuḍaiyāṉ of Vēlūr in Damaṉūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam, his younger brother Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ, his younger brother Chērikkūttaṉ and his younger brother Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyāṉ, who, with the help of paddy provided by the temple, permitted the irrigation facility consisting of 240 kuḻi of land and kalli tuṁbu (probably a sluice) through the tank called Periyadēvapputtēri, which irrigated their estate Veṇśiṉṟiyampākkam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīku
lottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūkkoṭṭa
ttuc ceṅkuṉṟaṉāṭṭu tirukkaccūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyanāṟku ceṅkuṉṟattuc ceṅkuṉṟaṅ
kiḻāṉ Oṟṟikoṇṭāṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉum Ivaṉ tampi kāraṇaiviṭaṅkaṉumivaṉ tampi perumānampi
yum Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattut tamaṉūrnāṭṭu velūrkkumaraṉ cāttan vāraṇaṅkāttāṉaṟamuṭaiyāṉu
mivan tampi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉu mivaṉ tampi cerikkūttaṉu mivaṉ tampi tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉu mivvaṉai
voñceṅkuṉṟappiṭākai Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyā yiṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam Āmpaṟpākkamāṉa Irantiṭu tiyākinal
lūrkku Eri Illāmaiyil Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa veṇciṉṟiyampākkatteriyāṉa periyatevapputteriyiley
nāyaṉār cipaṇṭārattu nelliṭṭu Irunūṟṟunāṟpatu kuḻiyum kallitūmpu miṭṭamaiyil Ivveriyil nir Iv
viraṇṭurkkum cantirādittavarai nilaviḻukkāṭṭile nir pāyak kaṭavatākac cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭuttom Ivva
ṉaivom Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.313 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
